text.title: AWS EC2 + ECS Core Rules
text.summary: 8 testable rules every application of `AWS EC2 + ECS` must enforce. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Default launch type MUST be Fargate; EC2 launch type requires explicit justification (GPU, custom kernel, sub-cent cost-per-task at very high scale).
rule.rationale: Fargate removes capacity-planning toil; EC2 ECS is rarely cheaper after node-management cost is counted.

rule.statement: New Fargate tasks MUST use ARM64 / Graviton; x86 requires ADR justification.
rule.rationale: Graviton is ~20% cheaper + comparable perf for most container workloads.

rule.statement: Tasks MUST use Task IAM Role (not EC2 instance profile). Permissions follow least-privilege per task definition.
rule.rationale: Instance-profile-only permissions leak across tasks on the same host; task roles isolate cleanly.

rule.statement: Network mode MUST be `awsvpc`; `bridge` and `host` are forbidden except for explicit performance-justified cases.
rule.rationale: awsvpc gives each task its own ENI + security group; bridge/host modes leak port + IAM context across tasks.

rule.statement: Service auto-scaling MUST be configured: target tracking on CPU or ALB request count per target, min ≥ 2 tasks for prod, max sized to peak + 30% headroom.
rule.rationale: Without auto-scaling, services either over-provision (cost) or under-provision (outage).

rule.statement: Production services MUST define a capacity provider strategy combining Fargate + Fargate Spot, with Spot weight bounded so total Spot ≤ 50% of capacity.
rule.rationale: Pure Spot is high-risk; pure on-demand is over-priced; weighted mix balances both.

rule.statement: Production deployments MUST use blue/green via CodeDeploy + ALB target group swap; rolling deploys are allowed only in dev / staging.
rule.rationale: Rolling deploys mix versions and complicate rollback; blue/green is atomic + instant rollback.

rule.statement: Container Insights MUST be enabled on the cluster; tasks MUST emit `awslogs` to a log group with retention ≥ 30 days.
rule.rationale: Without metrics + logs, ECS debugging falls back to docker exec — too late.

rule.statement: When preconditions in `Applies If` fail OR any item in `Skip If` triggers, do not run this methodology. Document the skip rationale in the artefact's parent log.
rule.rationale: Misapplied methodologies are worse than no methodology — they consume review cycles and produce false confidence.
